recommendations.title: The Apparition
recommendations.overview: Jacques Mayano, a French journalist who has lived a traumatic experience, is recruited by the Vatican to be part of a task force that must investigate the veracity of a supernatural apparition allegedly happened in a small French village.

recommendations.title: Marguerite
recommendations.overview: Paris in the 1920s. Marguerite Dumont is a wealthy woman with a passion for music and the opera. For years, she has performed regularly for a circle of guests. But Marguerite sings tragically out of tune and no one has ever told her. Her husband and

recommendations.title: In the Beginning
recommendations.overview: France, present day. A professional conman passes himself off as the boss of a construction site building a highway extension. He cons the whole region, hires dozens of workers and cynically enjoys the profits of his scam until he meets the lady mayo

recommendations.title: There's Still Tomorrow
recommendations.overview: In postwar Rome, a working-class woman dreams of a better future for herself and her daughter while facing abuse at the hands of her domineering husband. When a mysterious letter arrives, she discovers the courage to change the circumstances of her l

recommendations.title: Memoirs of a Geisha
recommendations.overview: In the years before World War II, a penniless Japanese child is torn from her family to work as a maid in a geisha house.

recommendations.title: King Richard
recommendations.overview: The story of how Richard Williams served as a coach to his daughters Venus and Serena, who will soon become two of the most legendary tennis players in history.

recommendations.title: Sgt. Stubby: An American Hero
recommendations.overview: The true story of the most decorated dog in American military history - Sgt. Stubby - and the enduring bonds he forged with his brothers-in-arms in the trenches of World War I.

recommendations.title: Cyrano de Bergerac
recommendations.overview: Famed swordsman and poet Cyrano de Bergerac is in love with his cousin Roxane. He has never expressed his love for her as he his large nose undermines his self-confidence. Then he finds a way to express his love to her, indirectly.

recommendations.title: The Horseman on the Roof
recommendations.overview: In a time of war and disease, a young officer gallantly tries to help a young woman find her husband.

recommendations.title: A Royal Affair
recommendations.overview: A young queen falls in love with her physician, and they start a revolution that changes their nation forever.
